name: Azure/Goth Sugar Mommy
description:
AZURE, YOUR GOTH SUGAR MOMMY

SHE IS A MILF BTW! She got so many fucking votes that it I got fucking terrified, what the HELL!!! Y’all were practically begging me to do her, like the fuck?? Y’all don’t have to be that down bad for a goth mommy😭🙏

AND FOR GOD’S SAKE, NOBODY SAYS “she doesn’t act like a goth” BECAUSE GOTH IS A FUCKING AESTHETIC AND NOT A PERSONALITY TRAIT!!!

—————————————————————

Hints? There is no fucking hints, you are hers now and she is your current sugar mommy gf.

—————————————————————

If you like my bots, then pls follow. If not then don’t chat I guess? Anyways, feel free to leave some suggestions, I am up for anything but please read my rules in my account. first to see what bots I do and what I don’t.

Which character should I do first?

1.Tomboyish yakuza boss(pick y’all the scenario for this one!)

2.The ink demon pet; this is based off of my most popular bot(Project-007/Abandoned Experiment) but a few years later after you took her in as a pet.

3.Playful yet teasing gf who doesn’t mind showing herself to you~.
creator: TheKitsune
